title: Heavy-Duty Carpet Protector – Strong Self-Adhesive Floor Protector – Premium Carpet Floor Covering - Waterproof Carpet Roll - Easy Unwind Plastic Carpet Protector - Safety Cutter Included
features: ✅ PROTECT YOUR CARPETS FROM COSTLY DAMAGE: Cover your carpets with this builders’-approved 2 x strong self-adhesive carpet cover protector to save them from dirt, spillages, staining, abrasion, and spraying during maintenance or repair work.

✅ SAVE TIME ON CARPET CLEANING: Our roll and stroll hard floor protector is thicker, stronger than similar carpet or vinyl flooring films, for optimal protection of your carpets against foot traffic, dirt, and wall paint

✅ GET MORE BANG FOR YOUR BUCK: The safety cutter included in your carpet protector roll box helps you cut with precision the carpet runner that you need and start painting, tiling, or plastering right away.

✅ GET A ROLL AND STROLL CARPET PROTECTOR: Place this carpet protector film on the carpet, unpeel 300mm of material, stick it to the floor, and push the floor protector roll forward. Smoothen the carpet protection film with your feet and cut the end with the safety knife included.

✅ NOT ALL CARPET PROTECTORS ARE MADE EQUAL: Our protective carpet cover is heavy-duty, punctureresistant, and will provide your carpets with long-lasting protection. Remove the floor protection within 20 days, to prevent sticky residue.
description: Product Description Now You Can Easily Protect Your Carpeted Areas From Repair Or Construction Mess! Carpet protection films are highly important, as they protect your flooring from damage during repair or renovation work and save you money on replacing your carpets. They are clear protective films that provide temporary protection for your carpet and can be easily removed and disposed of after you complete your project. By using a carpet protector, you can rest assured that your plastering, painting, or tiling job leaves no mess behind. Introducing The Ultimate Self-Adhesive Carpet Protector Roll By Builders Bull! Our self-adhesive carpet protector film will stick firmly to your carpet to protect it from paint stains, spray spills, dirt, dust, and soiling that occurs during general maintenance work. With a new improved formula, it is durable, tear-resistant, providing long-lasting carpet protection for up to 20 days – however, we recommend removing it within one week, in the event of heavy footfall or high temperatures. Our carpet covering protection film is easy to roll, fast to unwind, and will save you application headaches. It is offered in different sizes, for larger or smaller carpeted areas. And the most important thing, it comes in a mega-value set with a sturdy safety knife for fast and accurate cutting. Thick Plastic Made of sturdier, thicker, more durable plastic material, our carpet protection film is more resistant to tearing, punctures, and high temperatures than similar products on the market. Great Adhesive Capacity This self-adhesive carpet protector adheres to your carpet and stays firmly put without sliding. It is suitable for most common carpet types, but not for hard surfaces. Fully Waterproof With an upgraded liquid shield formula, our carpet protection film protects your carpets from chemical spraying or paint spills and saves you time on cleaning. Easy To Apply Our carpet protection roll is quick and easy to unwind. Follow the simple instructions for fast, efficient application before you start your repair, maintenance, or renovation project. No Sticky Residue Remove this carpet protection film after 20 days – or leave it on for just 1 week in high traffic areas. Avoid under-floor heating. Clean with soapy water to remove any sticky residue. Safety Cutter Included We offer you more than similar product sellers. Our carpet protector roll comes with our convenient safety knife for easy precision-cutting of the carpet protecting film. Must-Have Tool For Construction Professionals! Whether you are a painting, tiling, building professional or you want to complete a home renovation project by yourself, this carpet protector film is for you. It is easy to use, dust-proof, waterproof, designed to take the fuss out of carpet protection during maintenance work, and fully recyclable, leaving zero waste behind. What You Get: 1 * Carpet Protection Film Roll 500mm x 25m 1 * Safety Cutter Tool For Fuss-Free Cutting Keep Your Precious Carpets Clean – And Save Yourself The Fuss, Trouble, And Effort Of Scrubbing Stains!
